ksa_text: Conduct risk analysis of applications and systems undergoing major changes to identify and assess privacy and security impacts.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Security & Platform Strategy is a primary or secondary domain for the VP Data Engineering. This task KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (vp).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Security & Platform Strategy), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.453). External reviewers may question whether this specific task KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the VP Data Engineering versus adjacent roles.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Security & Platform Strategy appearing in job postings and role definition literature for VP Data Engineering.

decision_rationale: Security & Platform Strategy task KSA is within scope for the VP Data Engineering at the vp tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
